description: Phase 1 predefined icebreaker set. User must answer at least 3.

questions.prompt: What kind of collaboration are you most open to at this event?
What is one challenge you are currently trying to solve?
What type of intro would be highest value for you this week?
What domain or market are you most focused on right now?
What skill or capability do you bring that others often need?
What would make this event a win for you?
What kind of teams do you work best with?
What is one topic you can discuss for hours?
What stage are your current projects in?
What constraint is slowing your progress the most?
What would a strong follow-up conversation look like for you?
Which industries or use cases are you prioritizing this quarter?
What can someone quickly help you with after this event?
